messages.content:
Question 29
Increasing_______in the technology industries in Asia will force companies to recruit more qualified candidates.
A.
encounter
B.
challenge
C.
competition
D.
opponent
B. challenge

Question 30
Floor personnel should not sign out from their shift _______all of the shelves are adequately stocked.
A.
except
B.
until
C.
. earlier
D.
soon
B. until

Question 31
My school is_______by mountains and green fields.
A.
surround
B.
surrounded
C.
surrounding
D.
surrounds
B. surrounded

Question 32
_______is the most expensive city in the world?
- I think it is Tokyo.
A.
How
B.
What
C.
Where
D.
When
B. What

Question 33
___________it is a confidential project, staff are requested to use passwords to protect documents from competitors.
A.
Because
B.
Despite
C.
However
D.
Therefore
A. Because

Question 34
Columbus ______________America more than 400 years ago.
A.
discovering
B.
discovery
C.
discovered
D.
had discovered
C. discovered

Question 35
My son usually _____________his homework in the evenings.
A.
is doing
B.
did
C.
do
D.
does
D. does

Question 36
The book is_______the adventure of three close friends.
A.
at
B.
on
C.
about
D.
from
C. about

Question 37
Kevin Cruiser has been promoted to assistant manager of production_______his long record of hard work and dedication to the company.
A.
given that
B.
furthermore
C.
because of
D.
up to
C. because of

Question 38
Hoa looks red. She was outdoors yesterday. Perhaps she has ________.
A.
spots
B.
flu
C.
stomachache
D.
sunburn
D. sunburn

Question 39
What about_______by bus?
A.
we go
B.
going
C.
to go
D.
go
B. going

Question 40
They invite special_______to appear in the show.
A.
foxes
B.
guests
C.
character
D.
audiences
B. guests

Question 41
Prior to takeoff, flight personnel have to make sure that _______ of the passengers has fastened their seat belts and is sitting in an upright position.
A.
much
B.
all
C.
every
D.
each
D. each

TASK 1 - HALLS WILL COME TO LIFE WITH MUSIC
Albert Hall and Royal Hall have disclosed their schedules for the upcoming season, with everything (42)____________ classical music to stand up comedy acts and lots in between.

The Smiths are set to make their debut at 100-year-old Albert hall on Jan 25, 2007. The venerable venue (43)____________ will host Bruce Thornton on January 17, Ron Ghanem on January 3, Terry Lightfoot on January 9, and folk superstar Judith Bachman on February 12, 13 and 14.

At Royal Hall, in its classical (44)____________, American soprano Rosemary Voigt, Canadian  soprano lonathon Pierre,Canadian baritone Mel Finley, and Polish contralto Ceorge Podles (45)____________ on the bill.
Question 42
A.
over
B.
from
C.
up
D.
at
B. from

Question 43
A.
also
B.
either
C.
besides
D.
of
Đáp án của bạn:
ABCD
A. also

Question 44
A.
series
B.
steps
C.
separations
D.
occasions
A. series

Question 45
A.
was
B.
were
C.
is
D.
are
D. are

Choose the word or phrase that best completes the blanks:
Yesterday, November 10, at approximately 3 p.m. we had a temporary (46)____________of services.
 the time, an electrician was setting up some electric outlets in the machine room, (47)____________ various network servers are housed.

When he was finishing up, he found a loose wire which he connected the other day, so he had to reconnect it. However, it appears that when reconnecting it, he made some mistakes.
(48)____________ the machines affected were the new 
, one of the primary name serves, and Happer, which controls the new operating systems.
Thanks
Bill
Question 46
A.
status
B.
interruption
C.
affordability
D.
affair
B. interruption

Question 47
A.
where
B.
however
C.
which
D.
nearby
C. which

Question 48
A.
So
B.
Until
C.
Amid
D.
Among
A. So

PART 5 - READING COMPREHENSION
Read the passage and choose the correct answer:

18 Pine Hill Rd.
Mulberry, MI
65489
22 October 2007
Dear Mr. Johnson,

We received your request to change the dates of your reservation at the Glenwood Resort from April 15-22 to June 20-28. Unfortunately, I have checked the database and there are no rooms available for those dates. I sincerely apologize that we cannot accommodate your request; unfortunately June, July, and August are our busiest months because we offer special summer discounts. I understand that your company is relocating you to London in July and therefore you can’t make a reservation for any other date. I would like to mention, however, that Philip D. Humboldt, the owner of Glenwood Resort, recently opened another luxury resort, Woodshire Retreat, just thirty minutes outside of Mulberry. If you would like to make a reservation at this resort, the number is 1-800-238-9648. Or you can make a reservation online at www.humboldthotels.com.

Sincerely,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
Customer Services
Question 49
What is the purpose of this letter?
A.
To promote seasonal discounts
B.
To discuss plans to build a new hotel
C.
To suggest an alternative to the customer
D.
To provide directions to a resort
C. To suggest an alternative to the customer

Question 50
What did Mr. Humboldt achieve recently?
A.
He expanded his business.
B.
He recruited a new client
C.
He was relocated to London.
D.
He won a luxury vacation
A. He expanded his business.

Question 50
What did Mr. Humboldt achieve recently?
A.
He expanded his business.
B.
He recruited a new client
C.
He was relocated to London.
D.
He won a luxury vacation
A. He expanded his business.

Question 15
Construction crews have torn up the town's main road _______find that the underground water system is in the way of their plans.
A.
in order that
B.
so as
C.
even though
D.
only to
D. only to
